title: schizachyrium tenerum var. filiforme
intro: Schizachyrium tenerum var. filiforme, also known as Little Blue Stem, is a perennial grass native to North America, characterized by its slender stems and small, feathery leaves. Traditionally, the roots of Little Blue Stem have been used for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Little Blue Stem include reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and relieving respiratory problems, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for colds, flu, and other illnesses. Little Blue Stem can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
